output_contract.dat_ids: IDs that passed; no evidence text
output_contract.khong_ap_dung_ids: IDs not applicable after LLM conditional evaluation
output_contract.exceptions: Only KHONG_DAT or THIEU_DU_LIEU with evidence and notes

coverage_policy: The union of all three groups must exactly equal REQUIRED_CRITERIA with no duplicate or unknown ID.
compatibility_policy: Expand compact provider output locally to the existing 53-row result contract.

benchmark_2026_07_17.notes: Strict JSON Schema fixed response shape. All three runs required focused repair because some IDs appeared in conflicting groups; cross-array disjointness is validated locally because JSON Schema cannot express it.
